content: golangci-lint v2's latest release at research time is v2.12.2 (2026-05-06), one patch ahead of this repo's CI-pinned v2.12.1. This matches CONTEXT.md's observation that local brew-installed golangci-lint had drifted to 2.12.2 while CI stayed on v2.12.1 - confirms the drift direction empirically. Not a recommendation to bump the pin; only the sync mechanism is in scope for CFG-02.
